figures.caption: Table 2. Robust rank-based regression models for linguistic gains. B represents 506 unstandardized regression coefficients, indicating the change in the outcome for each one-unit 507 increase in the predictor. For vocabulary gain, child age is reported as a standardized coefficient (β) 508 to allow direct comparison with the factor Group. SE denotes the standard error. Overall model fit 509 was assessed using the reduction in dispersion test (p-value). Robust R² indicates the proportion of 510 dispersion explained by the rank-based model. Significance’s codes: *: p < 0 .05; **: p < 0.01. 511
Table 1. Baseline demographic characteristics by group at pre-training evaluation 498
